top_signals.title: Kalshi Eyes Copper Perpetual Futures After Precious Metals Push
top_signals.summary: Kalshi Inc. is eyeing plans to launch perpetual copper futures that would offer investors a new way to bet on the red metal as the artificial intelligence buildout boosts demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Two Oil Tankers Attached by Drones Near Black Sea CPC Terminal
top_signals.summary: Drones have attacked another two oil tankers approaching the Caspian Pipeline Consortium's terminal on Russia's shores of the Black Sea, further clouding prospects for oil exports from Kazakhstan, which uses the outlet, three industry sources said on Thursday.The closure of the terminal…
